name: Baked Bean Cassoulet
recipeIngredient: 1 pound dried red or kidney beans
12 ounces package smoked sausage links, cut into 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a slow-cooking pot, soak the beans in water overnight.
2. Cover and cook on high for 2 to 3 hours or until tender.
3. Drain the beans, saving the liquid.
4. Combine 1 cup of the saved liquid with onion, molasses, tomato sauce, salt, mustard, pepper, and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Mix the combination with the drained beans in the slow-cooking pot.
6. Cover and cook on low for 10 to 12 hours.
7. Add the sausage during the last hour of cooking.
